name: socadis
message: Socadis In 1970, Flammarion and Gallimard, two large French publishing companies, joined forces to found Socadis (Canadian Distribution Company), a center specializing in the distribution of books, while maintaining control of their respective commercial activities. This division of responsibilities therefore allows competing companies to coexist and benefit from the logistical expertise of an efficient distribution center managed by a team of professionals. Over the years, Socadis has been able to offer its services to other broadcasters.socadis.com
